documentation.value: Prints the given message and a newline to the standard output stream.
The value to print. Calls toString() on the argument.
Returns an immutable list containing the given elements.
The elements to include in the list.

signatures.label: mapOf(vararg pairs: Pair<K, V>): Map<K, V>

documentation.value: Returns an immutable map containing the given key-value pairs.
Key-value pairs created with the 'to' infix function.
Returns an immutable set containing the given distinct elements.
The elements to include in the set.
Parses the string as an Int number in the specified radix. Throws NumberFormatException if invalid.
The radix (base) to use for parsing. Defaults to 10.
Parses the string as a Double number. Throws NumberFormatException if the string is not a valid representation.
Returns a list containing the results of applying the given transform function to each element in the original collection.
A function to apply to each element.
Returns a list containing only elements matching the given predicate.
A function that returns true for elements to include.
Returns a new MutableList (ArrayList) with the given elements.
The initial elements for the mutable list.

signatures.label: Pair(first: A, second: B): Pair<A, B>

documentation.value: Creates a tuple of two values.
The first value of the pair.
The second value of the pair.

signatures.label: Triple(first: A, second: B, third: C): Triple<A, B, C>

documentation.value: Creates a tuple of three values.
The first value.
The second value.
The third value.
Throws an IllegalArgumentException if the value is false.
The condition to check.
A lambda producing the exception message if the check fails.
Throws an IllegalStateException if the value is false.
The condition to check.
A lambda producing the exception message if the check fails.
Creates a Lazy instance that uses the given initializer function. The value is computed on first access and cached.
The function to compute the lazy value on first access.
